environment_fixes: Built and installed full mmcv==2.0.1 with CUDA ops for the local Torch/CUDA environment, replacing the previous mmcv-lite-only state.
Created an MMOCR 1.x-compatible SAR_CN config using the official Chinese SAR dictionary.
Downloaded SAR_CN, DBNet++ and PANet checkpoints locally.
Generated a SAR_CN MMOCR 1.x compatibility checkpoint by padding decoder.prediction to match the current Dictionary output shape.
Added runtime compatibility shims for NumPy 2.x imgaug np.sctypes and Torch weights_only checkpoint loading.
Added per-frame fallback for PANet empty-crop OpenCV resize failures. Failed frames are emitted as empty OCR results instead of aborting the whole run.
notes: MMOCR now reports scores, but both configurations over-generate massive amounts of text on full-frame inputs, producing very high insertion counts and poor CER/precision.
PANet had several invalid empty crops; the runner records only those failed frames as empty outputs.
